about.heroTitle: Discover Real Travel Experiences Across Arab Countries
about.heroSubtitle: Explore hidden gems, share your journeys, and get real advice from a growing community of travelers across the Arab world.
about.ourStoryText: We built this platform to solve a simple problem: travel advice is everywhere, but real, trustworthy experiences are hard to find. Instead of relying on generic blogs or outdated guides, we wanted a space where travelers can share real stories, ask questions, and help each other explore the Arab world with confidence.
about.ourMissionText: Our mission is to make travel across Arab countries easier, more transparent, and more connected.
about.ourMissionPoint2: Provide real answers from real people
about.ourMissionPoint3: Build a trusted community around travel knowledge
about.ourVisionText: We envision a platform where every traveler can explore with confidence — guided not by ads, but by real experiences. We aim to become the go-to hub for discovering, sharing, and discussing travel across the Arab world.
about.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about using the platform and connecting with other travelers.
about.faq1Q: How can I share my travel experience?
about.faq1A: Create a post and our team will review it before publishing to ensure quality.
about.faq2Q: Can I ask questions about a destination?
about.faq2A: Yes! Use the Q&A section to ask anything — the community will help you.
about.faq3Q: How do I contact another traveler?
about.faq3A: You can send a contact request. Once accepted, you'll receive their contact details.
about.faq4Q: Why are posts reviewed before publishing?
about.faq4A: To maintain high-quality, reliable content and prevent spam.
about.faq5Q: Is the platform free to use?
about.faq5A: Yes, completely free for all users.
about.contactSubtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
about.contactSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
